title: PETZL TIKKA CORE Headlamp — 450 Lumens, Rechargeable
short_description: Compact and rechargeable PETZL TIKKA CORE headlamp with 450 lumens, red light, and multiple brightness levels.
long_description: The PETZL TIKKA CORE is a compact, lightweight, and rechargeable headlamp with a brightness of up to 450 lumens. Its wide, even beam is perfect for camping, hiking, and close-range work. With three white light levels and a red light mode, it offers flexible use at night.
buying_angle: Ideal for buyers who prioritize features like 450 lumens brightness, rechargeable CORE battery, and three white light levels in headlamps.
